rice Madhu Soil This rice is suitable for Red soil and Black cotton soil Rainfall A monthly rainfall of 100-200 mm Irrigation It requires 800 mm to 1,200 mm of water with extremes between 520 mm and 2,550 mm during the growing season Sowing time The sowing time of Madhu rice are Kharif April - September , Rabi October - December , Summer Zaid January - March Maturity time Time taken to mature is 120-125 days Yield It has the yield potential of 55-60 quintals per hectare Fertilizer Use crop-specific fertilizer recommendations based on soil condition and local agricultural guidance Pesticide Use recommended pest control only after proper diagnosis and according to local agricultural guidance Location Suitable zone in Karnataka are North Eastern Transition Zone, North Eastern Dry Zone and Northern Dry Zone Special feature High yielding, tolerant to cold Grains are medium slender It is moderately resistant to stem borer, bacterial leaf blight and blast

crop_name Rice, seed_name Madhu, rainfall A monthly rainfall of 100-200 mm, soil This rice is suitable for Red soil and Black cotton soil, irrigation It requires 800 mm to 1,200 mm of water with extremes between 520 mm and 2,550 mm during the growing season, sowing_time The sowing time of Madhu rice are Kharif April September , Rabi October December , Summer Zaid January March, maturity_time Time taken to mature is 120-125 days, seed_rate Seed requirement is 20 kg per hectare, avg_yeild It has the yield potential of 55-60 quintals per hectare, fertilizer Apply TNAU Rainfed rice MN mixture 12 5 kg ha as EFYM at 1 10 ratio incubated for 30 days at friable moisture, pesticide Lambda-cyhalothrin, malathion and zeta-cypermethrin are all broad-spectrum pesticides used on rice, location Suitable zone in Karnataka are North Eastern Transition Zone, North Eastern Dry Zone and Northern Dry Zone, special_feature High yielding, tolerant to cold Grains are medium slender It is moderately resistant to stem borer, bacterial leaf blight and blast

Dataset questionsv4 csv Columns questions, answers
questions asking about the control measure for aphid infestation in mustard crops, answers suggested him to spray rogor 2ml lit at evening time

questions asking about the control measure of flower drop problem in his coconut plant, answers suggested him to apply fertilizer in recommended dose like urea-600gm,ssp-1kg,mop-700gm,borax-25gm twice in a year march april and september october followed by trench method and also suggested him to spray planofix 1teaspoonful per20-25 liter of water
questions asking about how to avail kisan credit card loan for sali crop, answers suggested to consult with officer-marketing and recovery rural ,sbi local branch for details
questions asking about source of early ahu rice variety, answers suggested to take early ahu rice variety from atic,jorhat,aau campus through parcel or direct taking
